answer:
static block: 10 20
instance block: 30
ctor
instance block: 30
ctor
explanation: Static block runs once at class load: prints "static block: 10 20". For each new instance: instance initializer runs first (c=a+b=30, prints "instance block: 30"), then constructor prints "ctor".
alternatives:
static block: 10 20
instance block: 30
ctor
instance block: 30
ctor
